profiles.description: Named certificate policies. Keys are profile names referenced by hosts and agents.

cert_type.description: wildcard issues a *.domain.com certificate. multi issues a certificate with explicit SANs.

acme_challenge.description: ACME challenge type for this profile.

ttl.description: Requested certificate TTL. (If the broker is using Let's Encrypt as provider, this value is ignored).

renew_before.description: The broker renews a cached certificate when less than this time remains before expiry.

hosts.description: Registered hosts. Keys are host identifiers used for human reference only.

identity.description: The CN of this host's identity certificate as issued by step-ca.

profiles.description: List of profiles this host is allowed to request. Any profile not listed here will be rejected by the broker regardless of what the agent sends.
